name: Suggest a Resource
about: Know a great free resource that should be on this list?

labels: resource-suggestion

---

## Resource Details

**Name:** 
<!-- e.g. "CS50 by Harvard" -->

**URL:** 
<!-- e.g. https://cs50.harvard.edu/x/ -->

**Category it belongs in:** 
<!-- e.g. "Full Courses & Platforms", "Python", "AI & Machine Learning" etc. -->

**Short description (1 sentence):**
<!-- e.g. "Harvard's legendary intro to computer science — free certificate included." -->

**Why should it be added?**
<!-- What makes this resource stand out? Who is it best for? -->

**Checklist:**
- [ ] It is completely free (no paywall, no credit card required)
- [ ] It is actively maintained OR a timeless classic
- [ ] It is not already on the list
